assembly.notes: Generated labels are baked into RGBA stamp assets. Elements land on the exact narration word timestamp.

scenes.narration_text: Stop scrolling! Because if Argentina wins the FIFA World Cup 2026, football may never be the same.

beats.visual_description: a jubilant Argentina national-team footballer in a plain striped jersey without logos, raising a World Cup-style trophy overhead

scenes.narration_text: Football may never be the same again. Picture this. The final whistle blows. Argentina are world champions once again.

beats.visual_description: a football referee in action blowing a whistle, one arm lifted, no visible logos or text

scenes.narration_text: The stadium erupts. Millions of fans burst into tears and Buenos Aires transforms into one massive party.

beats.visual_description: a dense group of ecstatic football supporters in stadium stands, cheering and crying with joy, confetti in the air, no signs or readable text

scenes.narration_text: Winning two World Cups in a row would make Argentina the team every nation wants to beat.

beats.visual_description: two World Cup-style football trophies side by side as monumental editorial objects, no logos, no plaques, no text

scenes.narration_text: The football world would explode with debates, records and unforgettable celebrations.

beats.visual_description: a globe surrounded by layered microphones, newspaper pages with only abstract unreadable marks, and excited football pundit silhouettes, no readable text

scenes.narration_text: People everywhere would ask the same question. Has Argentina built the greatest World Cup dynasty of the modern era?

beats.concept: the whole world asks one question
beats.visual_description: a diverse crowd of football supporters around a large globe, hands raised in questioning gestures, no signs, no text

scenes.narration_text: Every player in this squad would become a national legend. The streets would be covered in blue and white.

beats.concept: every squad member becomes a legend
beats.visual_description: a heroic lineup of Argentina national-team football players in plain striped jerseys without logos, standing shoulder to shoulder in celebration

beats.concept: players elevated to national legend status

scenes.narration_text: Fireworks would light up the sky. Fans would celebrate until sunrise and the moment would be remembered for generations. But now, it is your turn.

beats.concept: all-night celebration from fireworks to sunrise
beats.visual_description: Buenos Aires football supporters celebrating in a city street beneath fireworks as dawn breaks, flags rendered without symbols or text

scenes.narration_text: Will Argentina actually win the FIFA World Cup 2026? Comment yes or no below.

beats.visual_description: a tense Argentina football supporter in a plain striped jersey, hands clasped, looking upward toward a World Cup-style trophy silhouette, no logos, no text
